response.overview: Syikin (Wanna Ali) is a new trainee working at a famous cafe. While working, she reunites with her old school friend named Hud (Alif Satar) who serves as the supervisor at the cafe. Old memories from their school days rekindle the hidden feelings of love in Hud's heart. However, Syikin is now with a doctor named Dr Firman (Malek Mccrone). Her relationship with Dr Firman is heavily envied by her stepsister Aein (Yuna Rahim), who has feelings for Dr Firman. This jealousy drives Aein to devise an evil plan to ruin Syikin's life. Syikin is deceived by Aein's scheme, resulting in a pregnancy. Due to this suspicion, Tuan Zaman (Ahmad Idham) becomes furious and forces Syikin to marry Dr Firman to prevent scandal to their family. Dr Firman feels as though he is being manipulated and refuses Tuan Zaman's request. Realizing the situation Syikin is facing, Hud then offers himself to marry Syikin to save their family's honor.
response.title: Bukan Sekadar Lafaz (TV3)
